## Change Summary

- PR Title format: `TEAM-1234: concise summary`
- Ticket: `TEAM-1234`
- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## High-Level Validation

- [ ] Lint and typecheck completed
- [ ] Unit or domain logic validated when applicable
- [ ] API behavior validated when applicable
- [ ] UI or integration behavior validated when applicable
- [ ] End-to-end or deployed smoke validation completed when applicable

## Change Area Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the required format
- [ ] Pull request title includes a ticket reference
- [ ] CODEOWNERS-impacting files were reviewed when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated when workflow, deployment, or release behavior changed

## Risk Review

- [ ] Procurement routing logic changed
- [ ] UI flow changed
- [ ] API contract changed
- [ ] CI or release workflow changed
- [ ] Deployment behavior changed
